config.title: Config Data
config.description: Configuration file for general simulation parameters.

purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.title: Land Use Change emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feed_land_use_change_emissions.description: Purchased feeds land use change emission values used in the EEE module.

animal.title: Animal data
animal.description: Input data and configuration information for animal management decisions, herd attributes, and housing properties.

animal_population.title: Animal population data
animal_population.description: Animal objects that herd initialization draws from during the simulation. A similar file can be generated using the -I and -s command line arguments simultaneously.

economy.title: Economy data
economy.description: Energy prices used in the EEE module.

emission.title: Emissions data
emission.description: General emission values used in the EEE module.

purchased_feeds_emissions.title: Emissions from purchased feeds
purchased_feeds_emissions.description: Purchased feeds emission values used in the EEE module.

feed.title: Feed data
feed.description: Feeds available for each animal combination, purchased feeds and their prices, feed storage options, and user-defined ration percentages and associated parameters.

NRC_Comp.title: NRC Comp data
NRC_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NRC (2001) guidelines.

NASEM_Comp.title: NASEM Comp data
NASEM_Comp.description: Nutritional information for each feed, following NASEM (2021) guidelines.

manure_management.title: Manure data
manure_management.description: Manure management decisions, including bedding type, handler, separator, and treatment information.

weather.title: Weather data
weather.description: Weather data used during the simulation, including date, precipitation, temperature, etc.

user_feeds.title: User Feed
user_feeds.description: Summary of feeds available for use in the simulation, including their RuFaS ID, short descriptors, and which nutrient composition file they are included in.

tractor_dataset.title: Tractor Dataset
tractor_dataset.description: Details agricultural machinery operations for various crops, including tractor size, operations (planting, mowing, collection, etc.), implement details, operational parameters (depth, width, mass), and throughput metrics, spanning different crop types and soil management practices.

EEE_constants.title: EEE Constants
EEE_constants.description: The constants that are used in EEE module.

crop Alfalfa 2022.title: Crop data Alfalfa 2022
crop Alfalfa 2022.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

fertilizer_schedule Alfalfa 2022.title: Fertilizer schedule Alfalfa 2022
fertilizer_schedule Alfalfa 2022.description: Fertilizer types available, and their application schedule.

manure_schedule Alfalfa 2022.title: Manure schedule Alfalfa 2022
manure_schedule Alfalfa 2022.description: Specifies manure applications to a field.

tillage_schedule Alfalfa 2022.title: Tillage schedule Alfalfa 2022
tillage_schedule Alfalfa 2022.description: Schedule of tillage applications for a field.

field Alfalfa 2022.title: Field specification Alfalfa 2022
field Alfalfa 2022.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

crop Corn Grain 2022.title: Crop data Corn Grain 2022
crop Corn Grain 2022.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

fertilizer_schedule Corn Grain 2022.title: Fertilizer schedule Corn Grain 2022
fertilizer_schedule Corn Grain 2022.description: Fertilizer types available, and their application schedule.

manure_schedule Corn Grain 2022.title: Manure schedule Corn Grain 2022

tillage_schedule Corn Grain 2022.title: Tillage schedule Corn Grain 2022
tillage_schedule Corn Grain 2022.description: Schedule of tillage applications for a field.

field Corn Grain 2022.title: Field specification Corn Grain 2022
field Corn Grain 2022.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

crop Corn Silage 2022.title: Crop data Corn Silage 2022
crop Corn Silage 2022.description: Crop selection and detailed rotation schedules.

fertilizer_schedule Corn Silage 2022.title: Fertilizer schedule Corn Silage 2022
fertilizer_schedule Corn Silage 2022.description: Fertilizer types available, and their application schedule.

manure_schedule Corn Silage 2022.title: Manure schedule Corn Silage 2022
manure_schedule Corn Silage 2022.description: Specifies manure applications to a field.

tillage_schedule Corn Silage 2022.description: Schedule of tillage applications for a field.

field Corn Silage 2022.title: Field specification Corn Silage 2022
field Corn Silage 2022.description: Field characteristics and references to field management specifications.

soil.title: Soil data
soil.description: Characteristic soil information, including composition, slope, and layer details.
